title: QA finds login bug, dev-fix child resolves it
prompt: Pipeline-mode only. Root task is qa-test scenario 'login validation'. Expected behavior: empty password should be rejected with reason='password required'. Current behavior: empty password reports 'password too short'. The qa-test agent must spawn a dev-fix child task; the dev-fix child fixes src/login.ts.

mockChain.createChildTitle: Fix: empty password reports wrong reason

bug_report.summary: validateLogin returns 'password too short' when password is empty; should return 'password required'
bug_report.expected: { ok: false, reason: 'password required' } when password is empty
